article.title: uber wlb ?
article.content:
Hi, how is the wlb/culture at uber India?
specially Cloud migration and disaster recovery (CMDR) team in Bangalore?

post.content: Should have high on call load. Uber is said to be more demanding.
WLB is pretty bad at Uber. That's not even the worst part. There is a mandatory PIP quota and people get laid off every year. After the recent performance reviews, many good folks at Uber got PIPed
